标题: Diving Masks Foldable Anti-Fog Snorkel Mask Set with Full Dry Top System for Free Swim Professional Snorkeling Gear Adults Kids
详情: [{"type": "text", "text": "How to choose the size? Firstly, Measure the distance between the sides of your cheeks . If the length is ≤ 12.5cm(4.9 inches) , it's suitable for size S/M. If the length is＞12.5cm(4.9 inches),it's suitable for size L/XL. Description: 1.Safety Airflow System: The upgraded snorkeling mask features a fully dry snorkeling system, which reduces the length of the snorkeling tube and increases the diameter to allow faster exhaust and better breathing. With the movable float ball design, it can effectively prevent water from flowing into the top, which eliminates the possibility of water entering the breathing tube to prevent choking, it allows you to enjoy snorkeling, free diving or swimming. 2.Professional Anti-leak Design: Snorkel mask follows the design of human face engineering. Compared with the traditional solid silicone skirt, our soft liquid silicone skirt is formed in one body, which can perfectly adhere to different face shapes and maintain a high standard of leakproofness and comfort. The drying system is built-in silicone seal in breathing tube, which can effectively prevents water from entering the mask and allow you to enjoy the underwater world safely. 3.Ultra-clear Anti-fog Design: Snorkel set is made of professional high-definition anti-fog flat lens, with wide field of vision, high transmittance and no dizziness. The nose cover is made of liquid silica gel, which fits perfectly with the nose and the breathing passage is completely isolated from the lens, prevents fogging. Our snorkel mask can also be used as swimming goggles, diving goggles. Complimentary camera stand allows you to record every beautiful moment underwater. 4.Comfortable and Lightweight: Compared with the full face type, the snorkel gear won't make you feel stuffy in summer, and the weight is only a quarter of the old full face snorkel mask. The snorkel set comes with adjustable straps that allow you to adjust to the most comfortable fit.Breather tube is detachable and foldable. which is light and small, easy to store and carry. 5.High Quality Material : snorkel gear is made of high-quality PC and food-grade liquid silicone, safe and environmentally friendly, non-toxic, non-odor, non-allergic, easy to clean, and especially suitable for long-term use. Adult Size

This diving mask is designed for professional use, ensuring a clear view underwater with its high-quality lens.

详情: [{"type": "text", "text": "Fresh air: oxygen flows in the top & Co2 expels out the bottom No gurgling: no water comes in the top vents, only air, due to Powerbreather innovative Membrane technology Sport PB0100 not Intended for flip turns in pool or choppy open. See lap or wave editions Open water swimming for freestyle, breast, butterfly and side stroke The POWER BREATHER Auch Suitable for children from around 7 years of age who can already swim well and under the supervision of their parents. Included: 1 Powerbreather - innovative snorkel system with intelligent FRESH AIR SYSTEM for 100% fresh air. 2 Speed Vent easy S The optimal swimming snorkel for swimming training in the pool The POWER BREATHER THE Next generation snorkel! With him you will experience swimming, but also snorkel diving in a new dimension. The POWER BREATHER Always provides you with 100% fresh air through the two air channels - no matter how long and how intensively you swim. You can fully concentrate on the rhythm of your movement without having to turn your head, without swallowing water, without blowing out the snorkel. When swimming freestyle, there is no rotating movement of the head to breathe. Your neck and head lie relaxed in the water while you swim over the POWER BREATHER inhale and exhale deeply – just like on land. The annoying blowing out of liquids is completely eliminated. The POWER BREATHER is the only snorkel you can dive with without having to blow it out with pressure. Intelligent valves protect against the ingress of water and allow possible water to escape automatically during long and deep dives via natural exhalation. So you can immediately continue breathing on the surface. The one-way air system always supplies you with unused, oxygen-rich air. Of the POWER BREATHER adapts perfectly to any head shape, it sits comfortably and securely without restricting your movement. Open water swimming for freestyle, breast, butterfly and side stroke

1 Powerbreather - innovative snorkel system with intelligent FRESH AIR SYSTEM for 100% fresh air.

The optimal swimming snorkel for swimming training in the pool
The POWER BREATHER THE Next generation snorkel! With him you will experience swimming, but also snorkel diving in a new dimension.
The POWER BREATHER Always provides you with 100% fresh air through the two air channels - no matter how long and how intensively you swim.
You can fully concentrate on the rhythm of your movement without having to turn your head, without swallowing water, without blowing out the snorkel. When swimming freestyle, there is no rotating movement of the head to breathe. Your neck and head lie relaxed in the water while you swim over the POWER BREATHER inhale and exhale deeply – just like on land. The annoying blowing out of liquids is completely eliminated.

The POWER BREATHER is the only snorkel you can dive with without having to blow it out with pressure. Intelligent valves protect against the ingress of water and allow possible water to escape automatically during long and deep dives via natural exhalation. So you can immediately continue breathing on the surface. The one-way air system always supplies you with unused, oxygen-rich air. Of the POWER BREATHER adapts perfectly to any head shape, it sits comfortably and securely without restricting your movement. This is ensured by its patented technology and excellent design.

详情: [{"type": "text", "text": "About this item 3 in 1 Snorkeling Gear for Adults: Package includes snorkel mask, dry snorkel, and adjustable fins. All you need is in one, and now you are ready for your adventure! This snorkel set makes your experience with learning how to swim and being underwater extremely fun and amazing! 180° Panoramic Anti-Fog Snorkel Mask: The snorkel mask is made of single layer of tempered glass which can withstand the water pressure while snorkeling and diving. Our snorkel mask treated with anti-fog technology features impact-resistant tempered glass, providing 180-degree high-definition large vision. Easy to Breathe Safe Dry Snorkel: The Snorkel with the most stable dry float valve design can be fixed on the snorkel mask by a buckle. When immersed in water, the snorkel is sealed to prevent water from entering the breathing tube, the lower purge valve can quickly drain the water. You can enjoy easy and unobstructed breathing while diving underwater. Short Blade Swim Fins: Compared with the stiff traditional long fins, the short blade fins make every kick do its job efficiently with less effort and more maneuverability, tailored for learners and amateurs who may have fewer requirements on speed. Quick-Dry Mesh Bag: If you are a travel fan, this snorkeling set will be your prior choice for its skillfully-designed travel-size snorkel flippers and snorkel mask set, which are stored in a drawstring gear bag, ensuring you no more messing or struggling for any parts, and leaving your trip well-organized. About this item

  • 3 in 1 Snorkeling Gear for Adults: Package includes snorkel mask, dry snorkel, and adjustable fins. All you need is in one, and now you are ready for your adventure! This snorkel set makes your experience with learning how to swim and being underwater extremely fun and amazing!
  • 180° Panoramic Anti-Fog Snorkel Mask: The snorkel mask is made of single layer of tempered glass which can withstand the water pressure while snorkeling and diving. Our snorkel mask treated with anti-fog technology features impact-resistant tempered glass, providing 180-degree high-definition large vision.
  • Easy to Breathe Safe Dry Snorkel: The Snorkel with the most stable dry float valve design can be fixed on the snorkel mask by a buckle. When immersed in water, the snorkel is sealed to prevent water from entering the breathing tube, the lower purge valve can quickly drain the water. You can enjoy easy and unobstructed breathing while diving underwater.
  • Short Blade Swim Fins: Compared with the stiff traditional long fins, the short blade fins make every kick do its job efficiently with less effort and more maneuverability, tailored for learners and amateurs who may have fewer requirements on speed.
  • Quick-Dry Mesh Bag: If you are a travel fan, this snorkeling set will be your prior choice for its skillfully-designed travel-size snorkel flippers and snorkel mask set, which are stored in a drawstring gear bag, ensuring you no more messing or struggling for any parts, and leaving your trip well-organized. Take it and conquer the sea!

PRODUCT ADVANTAGES:

The profional snorkeling mask provides a 180° panoramic view, making it easier to breathe when snorkeling, and helping you more clearly. Impace-resistant tempered glass is good to provide protection.



COMFY FIT LEAK PROOF SKIRT PROTECT YOUR EYES FROM WATER:

Comfortable fit came from the soft silicone material and ergonomic skirt design; adjusting the head strap to suitable position, goggles match the face contour well and this can also create a good seal effect without skin marks on face. Nose pocket design to avoid getting water into nose by mistakely breathing with nose.



DRY TOP SNORKEL WITH PURGE VALVE:

Snorkel allows you to breath when face-down on the surface of the water so you can stay in the wondrous moment as much as possible. Adopting floate valve at the top of breathing tube can completely seal to keep water out. One-way purge valve help to clear out water leak into snorkel quickly. Fixed buckle on it can help to attach it with swim mask.



MASK AND SNORKEL SET FOR EVERY SNORKELING, SWIMMING LOVERS!

Mask + Snorkel combo is a most common snorkeling gear. This snorkeling set is mainly for adults, unisex. Mask and snorkel set together for snorkeling, separately mask can be used for swimming. Additionally, qualified material is used to manufacture the snorkel set so that it can be durable enough.
